parsed_review.summary: CP00-673 is a clean descriptor-only RP22 External Integrations I "Test And Golden Case Set" boundary-precheck binding pack (risk A, 10 units, RP22.P02.M07.S03-S12) following the established CP666-672 pattern. Direct read-only inspection confirms full internal consistency: pack binding agrees across manifest.json, review-baseline.json, the live closeout-pack-plan.json (live_state.pack_id=CP00-673), and next-pack-queue.json (live_latest_pack_id=CP00-673), with matching source_ledger_sha and deliverable distribution {implementation:6,security_audit:2,ui:2}. The contract cp673_descriptor/cp673_requirements/cp673_no_write_attestation match registry.js exports, service.js descriptor/case-set/hermes/claude/handoff builders, and the validators.js coverage + descriptor + projection deep-equal checks; index.js re-exports all five required public exports; model.test.js covers CP673 coverage and descriptor binding and validates both contract files against the projection (the two contract files are intentionally identical, written from one projection by the --write validator). Boundaries hold: descriptor_only=true, all runtime flags false, claude_is_final_approval=false (validator-asserted), Hermes used only for review-packet/evidence handling (hermes_runtime_opened=false, runtime_receipt_emitted=false), comprehensive no-write/no-real-data attestations, and no token/secret/raw-payload values present. State files correctly show no over-claim (manifest production_ready=false/runtime_ready=false; construction-inspection PENDING_PACK_LEVEL_REVIEW; adjudication/claude-review-result pending), and the readiness auth preflight passed (exit 0, non-empty valid-JSON stdout). Provenance: source/contract/test consistency verified by direct read; the reported 22/22 validation-command passes in command-evidence.json were not re-executed under this read-only review. The pack claims neither runtime nor enterprise trust, so this CP closeout goal is not blocked. No P0-P3 findings.
